2026-04-13:
# Weekly Status Update
**Week of April 13–19, 2026**

---

## Updates in Detail

- **Infrastructure Deployment & Configuration**: Successfully deployed 6 out of 8 core project services to CPC development and production VMs, including PostgreSQL, MinIO, Lakekeeper, Apache Spark, Airbyte, and Kestra. Configured necessary storage buckets and user provisioning for data ingestion workflows.

- **Network Access Coordination**: Collaborated extensively with IT Network team to resolve connectivity issues, securing internet access approval (8am–5pm until April 30), enabling port access per VM specifications, and identifying required domains for application deployments.

- **Azure DevOps Pipeline Setup**: Resolved deployment automation challenges by implementing workarounds for Ansible collection downloads and package installation limitations on Azure DevOps agents, enabling successful pipeline execution.

- **Integration & Testing**: Configured external MinIO integration for Airbyte despite limited documentation, and successfully validated end-to-end data flow from PostgreSQL to MinIO storage.

- **Code Quality Improvements**: Refactored Ansible automation by extracting Java installation as a reusable component, optimizing deployment templates and roles for maintainability.

---

## Challenges & Issues

- **Network Access Delays**: Lack of internet connectivity and incomplete documentation on application domain requirements caused deployment delays for Airbyte and Kestra, requiring iterative coordination with IT Network team.

- **Azure DevOps Environment Constraints**: Encountered limitations installing required packages and updating apt repositories on DevOps agents, necessitating alternative approaches for Ansible execution.

- **Third-party Documentation Gaps**: Poor documentation for Airbyte's custom configuration options, particularly for external storage integration, increased implementation complexity.

---

## Achievements & Accomplishments

- **Major Milestone Reached**: Deployed 6 of 8 project services (75% completion) and informed client of progress, demonstrating significant advancement toward project goals.

- **Successful Workaround Implementation**: Overcame Azure DevOps technical constraints by researching and implementing alternative Ansible deployment methods without native Python support.

- **End-to-End Validation**: Completed first successful test of the data ingestion pipeline, validating connectivity and data flow between PostgreSQL source and MinIO storage destination.

---

## Action Items

- Complete deployment of remaining 2 services (Airbyte and Kestra) to assigned production VM
- Finalize bug fixes and optimizations across Ansible roles and deployment templates
- Follow up with IT Network team on outstanding port access configurations and domain allowlisting

---

## Plan for Next Week

- Complete deployment and testing of final 2 services to achieve 100% infrastructure deployment
- Conduct comprehensive integration testing across all deployed services
- Finalize automation code optimization and documentation updates
- Coordinate with client on readiness for production handover
2026-04-27:
# Weekly Status Update
**Week of 27 Apr 2026 – 3 May 2026**

---

## Updates in Detail

- **Secrets Management Infrastructure**: Deployed and integrated HashiCorp Vault as the centralized secrets management solution across our data platform. Successfully configured Airbyte to store connector secrets in Vault, and implemented a custom sidecar solution to enable secure secrets access in Kestra (OSS version) without exposing credentials in plaintext.

- **Kestra Deployment Enhancement**: Extended our Kestra Ansible deployment template to support custom Docker image creation and automated builds. This enables users to specify pre-built images for workflow tasks, eliminating redundant package downloads and simplifying task configurations.

- **OpenMetadata External Ingestion**: Completed R&D and successfully implemented external ingestion capabilities for OpenMetadata using Kestra as the orchestration layer (replacing the need for Airflow). All ingestion components are now functional: metadata, lineage, profiling, usage analytics, and auto-classification.

- **Demo Preparation & Validation**: Collaborated with the Data Governance Specialist to validate OpenMetadata ingestion workflows against demo data sources. Prepared and tested external ingestion workflows in Kestra for Monday's upcoming demonstration.

- **Security & Governance Configuration**: Studied and configured HashiCorp Vault admin accounts and access policies aligned with CPC Data Lakehouse project security requirements.

---

## Challenges & Issues

- No significant blockers encountered this week.

---

## Achievements & Accomplishments

- **End-to-End Pipeline Validation**: Successfully executed a complete data pipeline from ingestion through transformation to gold layer querying, confirming all core components and applications are production-ready.

- **External Metadata Ingestion Proof-of-Concept**: Delivered a working solution for OpenMetadata external ingestion using custom pre-built Docker images, successfully ingesting metadata from the bronze layer to the CPC OpenMetadata instance.

---

## Action Items

- Finalize domain (F5) configuration for deployed applications through IT Operations team
- Continue R&D on external metadata and lineage ingestion for additional data sources (ClickHouse, Iceberg)

---

## Plan for Next Week

- Request VM allocation for Staging and Production environments
- Complete domain configuration for all deployed applications
- Expand external ingestion capabilities to additional data source types
- Finalize preparation for Monday demonstration
2026-04-20:
# Weekly Status Update
**Week: 20 Apr 2026 – 26 Apr 2026**

---

## Updates in Detail

- **Infrastructure Deployment**: Successfully deployed all required services (ClickHouse, OpenSearch, OpenMetadata) on the CPC development VM, completing the foundational infrastructure setup for the data lake architecture.

- **End-to-End Data Pipeline Implementation**: Initiated and configured a test data flow across the complete data lake architecture, including automated data ingestion (Airbyte), transformation workflows (Kestra with Spark), and iceberg table management (Lakekeeper) spanning bronze, silver, and gold layers.

- **Technical Support & Collaboration**: Provided technical overview to CPC Database Security engineer to align security requirements with project implementation. Assisted Data Governance specialist with OpenMetadata setup, identifying hardware constraints that require system upgrade.

- **Issue Resolution**: Resolved critical permission issues preventing Kestra from submitting Spark jobs to the CPC development server by adjusting the Docker configuration approach and implementing additional Spark deployment configurations.

---

## Challenges & Issues

- **Kestra-Spark Integration**: Encountered permission issues with Kestra's docker-in-docker approach when executing Spark tasks. Resolved by utilizing Spark CLI alternative and applying additional Spark configurations.

- **Hardware Limitations**: Data Governance specialist unable to run OpenMetadata locally due to insufficient system resources; upgrade request initiated through appropriate channels.

- **Database Access Scoping**: Awaiting response from client DBA regarding table access requirements; need to complete table scope documentation before user access can be provisioned.

---

## Achievements & Accomplishments

- **Complete Environment Deployment**: Successfully deployed all 8 required services on the CPC development VM, establishing a fully functional development environment.

- **Functional Data Pipeline**: Implemented working proof-of-concept data flow demonstrating realistic attendance data processing through bronze and silver layers with Spark transformations and Iceberg table management.

---

## Action Items

- Complete scoping documentation of required database tables for DBA to provision appropriate access credentials.

- Continue debugging Python Spark submit task permission issues in Kestra for enhanced pipeline flexibility.

---

## Plan for Next Week

- Extend data pipeline by configuring additional transformation tasks in Kestra to process data from silver to gold layer.

- Establish ClickHouse integration to query gold layer data, completing the end-to-end analytics pipeline.
